title: puccinellia pringlei
intro: Puccinellia pringlei, also known as Pringle's alkali grass, is a species of grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Puccinellia pringlei include wound healing, reducing fever, and treating various skin conditions. Puccinellia pringlei can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its reported benefits.
